title: Melted Chocolate Ukrainian Eggs Frittata
description: A rich and indulgent Ukrainian dish featuring eggs and melted chocolate, this frittata is perfect for a special breakfast or brunch, and can be made egg-free friendly by substituting the eggs with a suitable alternative. It has a pungent and bouncy texture that is sure to delight.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
Add the shredded cheese and melted chocolate to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of the frittata.
Dot the top of the frittata with the butter.
Bake the frittata for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove the frittata from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve hot.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
